records.raw_message: Hi, I tried logging in this morning and keep getting a 403 error. My account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This started after your update last Tuesday.

enrichment.issue_summary: User experiencing 403 error when attempting to login, which started after Tuesday's update.

records.summary: Customer jsmith is unable to log into their account due to a 403 error that began occurring after last Tuesday's system update. This appears to be a login authentication issue that is completely blocking user access to the platform.

records.raw_message: We'd love to see a bulk export feature for our audit logs. We're a compliance-heavy org and this would save us hours every month.

enrichment.issue_summary: Customer requests a bulk export feature for audit logs to improve compliance workflow efficiency.

records.summary: Customer from a compliance-heavy organization is requesting a bulk export feature for audit logs. They indicate this feature would save them hours every month in their compliance processes. This appears to be a valuable enhancement request that could improve operational efficiency for compliance-focused customers.

records.raw_message: Invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1,240 but our contract rate is $980/month. Can someone look into this?

enrichment.issue_summary: Customer is disputing an invoice charge that exceeds their contracted monthly rate.

records.summary: Customer reports that Invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1,240 which exceeds their contracted rate of $980/month. They are requesting investigation into this billing discrepancy to resolve the overcharge.

records.raw_message: I'm not sure if this is the right place to ask, but is there a way to set up SSO with Okta? We're evaluating switching our auth provider.

enrichment.issue_summary: Customer is asking about setting up SSO integration with Okta as they evaluate switching authentication providers.

records.summary: Customer is inquiring about SSO integration capabilities with Okta as part of their authentication provider evaluation process. This appears to be a pre-sales or implementation question rather than an urgent technical issue. The inquiry suggests they are actively considering ArcVault but need technical confirmation about integration possibilities.

records.raw_message: Your dashboard stopped loading for us around 2pm EST. Checked our end — it's definitely on yours. Multiple users affected.

enrichment.issue_summary: Dashboard stopped loading for multiple users starting around 2pm EST with issue confirmed to be on ArcVault's side.

records.summary: Customer reports dashboard loading failure affecting multiple users since 2pm EST. They have ruled out issues on their end and confirmed the problem is with ArcVault's system. This appears to be an active outage requiring immediate attention.
